title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years in the Twinkle Series with
Kitasan Black have come to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
People have come to recognize not only her skills
as a runner, but also as a performer. Thanks to
that...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I'm appearing on a prime time
singing show! I feel like I'm in a dream!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This is no dream! It's all thanks to your amazing
concerts that fans love. And of course...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's the result of your hard work and singing
ability. Let's do our best today!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh right, we should warm up first. Let's begin with
vocal training. Ahem...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Only I'm getting a kiss from the Goddess of
Victory todaAaAay!
choice_data_list: Dial back on that vocal run!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oops! I overdid it again! Thanks for the warning,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Right. I need to be cute! Cute... I've gotta be a
pop star Uma!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan and Teio
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Umadacchi! Oooh! Umapyoi, umapyoi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black leaps energetically around the
stage. Her performance is well-received and
garners rave reviews.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Teio! We did it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that was great! That was probably your
best performance yet!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I think so too! I worked my butt off practicing for
it! I wanted everyone to have the best time of
their lives!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I know we performed as a pair today, but I'm
going to do my best during the song...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And one day, I hope I'll get asked to do a solo
enka performance!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Kita... There's something I have to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: What is it?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Umapyoi.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Umapyoi. We gotta do "Umapyoi." Whenever we
go on TV, that's what we've gotta sing.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whaaa? I mean, I like "Umapyoi," but can't we
sing something else too?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I really like when you sing "Love Is at the
Derby☆"! If it was my choice, I'd have you sing
that.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. But we need to sing "Umapyoi" for our
first song.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The first time I stood on the same stage as Prez,
she told me something important...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Listen well, Teio. Races are extremely important
to us Umamusume. However...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Winning concerts are equally important spaces
for us to express ourselves. Please don't forget
that.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
A space to express ourselves... What should I do,
then?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I want you to strive for a performance that only
an Umamusume can give.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You must utilize your running and jumping ability
in your performance.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If you want a song that perfectly showcases how
bright and fun we Umamusume are, then
"Umapyoi Legend" is the obvious choice.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't that make it the perfect intro to our
world?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I see... How bright and fun Umamusume are...
When you put it that way, it makes total sense.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm going to master "Umapyoi Legend" first
before I get started on my enka song.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Good. That's the way to do it! Umapyoi comes
first, and then you follow it up with some more
Umapyoi!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Right! Anything else is just for breathers—when
it's show time, it's Umapyoi time! Come on,
Trainer, you join in too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Of course! We have to spread Umapyoi together.
And one day...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We'll be able to be on a big singing show! Right
then, let's go! One, two...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan and Teio
text_block_list.text: Umapyoi! Umapyoi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so another Umamusume passes down her
singing expertise, allowing their shared concert to
take on a new form.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black continues to polish her rendition of
"Umapyoi." As for the day she can show off her
enka skills... That's still far in the future.
